description: Authorization anchor for a tadori tracing case. EVERY live write to the tadori case graph MUST reference an active caseMandate (G3 authorized-investigation-only); absent a mandate tadori runs Phase 0 dry-run only. Parallels tsukuroi's remediationMandate (ADR-2605291500) and the malak case-anchor model (ADR-2605152000). Carries the authorization basis (fraud-victim recovery / AML-CTI duty / sanctioned-entity tracing / Council-authorized Transparent Force action per Charter §1.12). R0 = schema skeleton; R1 = additionalProperties=false + required-field enforcement + authority-signature verification.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of mandate emit.

caseId.description: Stable case anchor id (e.g. case:<slug>-<yyyymmdd>). Every tx/addr/cluster/label/attribution datom links back to this. G3.

transparentForceLogged.description: G5 ON-CHAIN-MONITORABLE: every case action emits an on-chain-anchored audit datom; structurally true (Charter §1.12).

authoritySignature.description: Detached signature over the mandate payload, verifies against authorityDid. G7-equivalent.

authorizationRef.description: CID / URL / document id of the written authorization (victim engagement, AML mandate, sanctions order, Council resolution). G3: no live write without this.

revoked.description: One-way, immediate revocation by the authorizing party.

authorizationBasis.description: Constitutional basis for the trace (Charter §1.12 Transparent Force discipline applies to council-transparent-force).

phase.description: 0 = dry-run (no live write); 1 = live write to kotoba case graph. Default 0 (malak contract).

authorityDid.description: etzhayyim approver DID ∈ authority chain (Council Lv6+ for council-transparent-force basis).

scopeChains.description: Chains in scope for this case (e.g. bsc, eth, btc). Out-of-scope chains are not traced under this mandate.
